title: GDPR Adopted by European Parliament
description: The European Parliament formally adopted the General Data Protection Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2016/679), replacing the 1995 Data Protection Directive.

title: GDPR Takes Effect
description: The GDPR became enforceable across all EU/EEA member states after a two-year transition period.

title: Google Fined €50M by CNIL
description: France's CNIL imposed a €50 million fine on Google for lack of transparency, inadequate information, and lack of valid consent regarding ad personalization.

title: Schrems II Decision (CJEU)
description: The Court of Justice of the EU invalidated the EU-US Privacy Shield framework and affirmed the validity of Standard Contractual Clauses with additional safeguard requirements.

title: New Standard Contractual Clauses Adopted
description: The European Commission adopted modernized SCCs for international data transfers with a modular approach covering four transfer scenarios.

title: WhatsApp Fined €225M by Irish DPC
description: Ireland's DPC imposed a €225 million fine on WhatsApp for GDPR transparency violations after EDPB directed an increased fine.

title: Instagram Fined €405M by Irish DPC
description: Meta's Instagram fined €405 million for violations related to the processing of children's personal data.

title: Meta Fined €390M by Irish DPC
description: Meta fined €390 million for using contractual necessity as a legal basis for behavioral advertising on Facebook and Instagram.

title: Meta Fined €1.2B by Irish DPC
description: Record €1.2 billion fine imposed on Meta for transferring EU user data to the US without adequate safeguards, following the Schrems II ruling.

title: EU-US Data Privacy Framework Adopted
description: European Commission adopted adequacy decision for the EU-US Data Privacy Framework, enabling transatlantic data flows.

title: EU AI Act Formally Adopted
description: European Parliament approved the AI Act establishing the world's first comprehensive legal framework for artificial intelligence.

title: EU AI Act — Prohibited AI Practices in Force
description: First tranche of EU AI Act obligations take effect: banned AI practices including social scoring and manipulation.
